title: Vivo Technologies Hello Summer Dog Cooling Mat - Non-Toxic Gel Self Cooling Pad, Ideal for Dogs in Hot Summer - Small 30 x 40cm
features: Magic Ultra Cool Gel Pad. Automatically cools down when your pet sits on it. No electricity, No water, Non-toxic
Ideal for pets with heat stroke, skin conditions or allergies. Can be placed in pet beds and baskets

The cooling pet mat is designed to give your pet a cool and refreshing sensation during the summer or anytime your pet may need to cool down, the pet cooling mat is ideal for pets with heat stroke , skin conditions, allergies or post-surgery
